allow: Bash(node -e ' *)
Bash(node scripts/scrape-background.js house-agent)
Bash(node index.js "backgrounds:extra")
Bash(node scripts/build-data.js)
Bash(npx tsc *)
Bash(git diff *)

Bash(node -e "const c=require\('./public/data/classes.json'\); const w=c.wizard; console.log\(JSON.stringify\(Object.keys\(w\),null,2\)\); const l=w.level_data; if\(l\) console.log\('has level_data, first entry:', JSON.stringify\(l[0],null,2\)\); else console.log\('no level_data key, keys:', Object.keys\(w\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const c=require\('./public/data/classes.json'\); const w=c.warlock; console.log\('warlock level 5:', JSON.stringify\(w.levels[4],null,2\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const c=require\('./public/data/classes.json'\); const b=c.barbarian; console.log\('barbarian level 5:', JSON.stringify\(b.levels[4],null,2\)\)")
Bash(curl -s http://localhost:5173)

Bash(node -e "const c=require\('./public/data/classes.json'\); console.log\('fighter:', JSON.stringify\(c.fighter.weapon_proficiencies\)\); console.log\('wizard:', JSON.stringify\(c.wizard.weapon_proficiencies\)\); console.log\('rogue:', JSON.stringify\(c.rogue.weapon_proficiencies\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const eq=require\('./public/data/equipment.json'\); const w=eq.weapons; console.log\('sample weapons:', JSON.stringify\(w.slice\(0,3\), null,2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const c=require\('./public/data/classes.json'\); console.log\('wizard name:', c.wizard.name\); console.log\('fighter name:', c.fighter.name\); console.log\('cleric name:', c.cleric.name\)")
Bash(node -e "const c=require\('./public/data/classes.json'\); Object.entries\(c\).forEach\(\([k,v]\) => console.log\(k, ':', v.saving_throw_proficiencies\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const s=require\('./public/data/spells.json'\); const keys=Object.keys\(s\); console.log\('total spells:', keys.length\); console.log\('first spell keys:', JSON.stringify\(Object.keys\(s[keys[0]]\),null,2\)\); console.log\('first spell:', JSON.stringify\(s[keys[0]],null,2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const s=require\('./public/data/spells.json'\); const cantrips=Object.values\(s\).filter\(sp=>sp.level===0\).slice\(0,3\); console.log\('cantrip example:', JSON.stringify\(cantrips[0]\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const eq=require\('./public/data/equipment.json'\); console.log\('categories:', Object.keys\(eq\)\); console.log\('armor sample:', JSON.stringify\(eq.armor[0]\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const c=require\('./public/data/classes.json'\); console.log\('Bard L1:', JSON.stringify\(c.bard.levels[0].class_specific\)\); console.log\('Bard L2:', JSON.stringify\(c.bard.levels[1].class_specific\)\); console.log\('Wizard L1:', JSON.stringify\(c.wizard.levels[0].class_specific\)\); console.log\('Sorcerer L1:', JSON.stringify\(c.sorcerer.levels[0].class_specific\)\); console.log\('Ranger L1:', JSON.stringify\(c.ranger.levels[0].class_specific\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const c=require\('./public/data/classes.json'\); const b=c.bard; console.log\('bard keys:', Object.keys\(b\)\); console.log\('bard L1 keys:', b.levels ? JSON.stringify\(b.levels[0]\) : 'NO LEVELS'\)")

Bash(node -e "const c=require\('./public/data/classes.json'\); const b=c.bard; console.log\('bard.levels type:', typeof b.levels, Array.isArray\(b.levels\)\); if\(b.levels\) { console.log\('first level:', JSON.stringify\(b.levels[0]\)\) } else { console.log\('levels val:', b.levels\) }")

Bash(node -e "const c=require\('./public/data/classes.json'\); const b=c.bard; console.log\('levels keys:', Object.keys\(b.levels\).slice\(0,5\)\); const firstKey=Object.keys\(b.levels\)[0]; console.log\('first entry:', JSON.stringify\(b.levels[firstKey]\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const c=require\('./public/data/classes.json'\); const classes=['wizard','cleric','druid','paladin','ranger']; classes.forEach\(name => { const cls=c[name]; const l1=cls.levels['1']; console.log\(name, 'L1 cs keys:', l1 ? Object.keys\(l1.class_specific\) : 'NO LEVEL'\) }\)")

Bash(node -e "const c=require\('./public/data/classes.json'\); const w=c.wizard; const l4=w.levels['4']; console.log\('wizard L4 features:', l4.features\); const l20=w.levels['20']; console.log\('wizard L20 features:', l20.features\)")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./public/data/classes.json'\); Object.entries\(d\).forEach\(\([k,v]\) => console.log\(k, JSON.stringify\(v.primary_ability\), v.spellcasting?.ability ?? 'none'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./public/data/classes.json'\); const w = d['warlock']; console.log\(JSON.stringify\(Object.keys\(w\), null, 2\)\); console.log\('levels keys:', Object.keys\(w.levels || {}\)\); console.log\('level1:', JSON.stringify\(w.levels?.['1'], null, 2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const data = require\('./data/equipment/wondrous_items.json'\); console.log\('Items:', data.length\); const names = data.map\(i=>i.name\).sort\(\); console.log\('First:', names[0]\); console.log\('Last:', names[names.length-1]\); const dupes = names.filter\(\(n,i\)=>names.indexOf\(n\)!==i\); console.log\('Dupes:', dupes.length ? dupes : 'none'\);")

JSON.stringify\(bb[1], null, 2\) : 'not found'\); console.log\('total spells:', Object.keys\(spells\).length\);")
